MINI MINUTES:

Hearing Re: PETITIONER SAMUEL SCHONER's Hearing On Petition To Confirm Arbitration Award.

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling.

The unopposed motion to confirm arbitration award is granted.

Order submitted. Judgment submitted.
